subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-25 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: When they brought Us unto Haifa, they led Us unto a small chamber. Thereafter did they convey Us in a small vessel unto 'Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که ما را به حیفا آوردند به یک اطاق کوچکی بردند.  بعد در قایق بادی کوچکی به عکا بردند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @Imam Husayn, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
